title: Difficult Minecraft DataPack
body:
**All Mobs Are Faster And Stronger Then The Player Now, All Zombies Are Armored, All Skeletons Will Ride Spiders And Alot Of Skeletons Will Choose The Same Spider To Ride, All Creepers Are Now Charged, All Enderman Will Now Be Mad At All Players, All Entities Are Harder To Kill.**

Try To Beat The Game With This DataPack Or Something.
See You Next Time Guys!!!
